+using BenchmarkDotNet.Attributes;
+using BenchmarkDotNet.Running;
+using TextAnalysis;
+
+BenchmarkRunner.Run<TextAnalyzerBenchmarks>();
+
+[MemoryDiagnoser]
+public class TextAnalyzerBenchmarks
+{
+    private TextAnalyzer _analyzer = null!;
+
+    private const string SampleText =
+        "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog " +
+        "A stitch in time saves nine " +
+        "To be or not to be that is the question " +
+        "All that glitters is not gold " +
+        "The only thing we have to fear is fear itself " +
+        "In the beginning was the word and the word was with God " +
+        "It was the best of times it was the worst of times " +
+        "Call me Ishmael Some years ago never mind how long precisely " +
+        "It is a truth universally acknowledged that a single man in possession " +
+        "of a good fortune must be in want of a wife";
+
+    [GlobalSetup]
+    public void Setup() => _analyzer = new TextAnalyzer(SampleText);
+
+    [Benchmark]
+    public double AverageWordLength() => _analyzer.AverageWordLength();
+
+    [Benchmark]
+    public object WordLengthHistogram() => _analyzer.WordLengthHistogram();
+
+    [Benchmark]
+    public int UniqueWordCount() => _analyzer.UniqueWordCount();
+}
+
